description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of white and light wood paneling, large glass sliding doors, and multiple balconies with white railings. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a wooden deck with an umbrella, and lush landscaping with palm and flowering trees. The front of the house has a driveway with a parked car, a small entryway with steps, and vertical wooden slats as decorative elements. The windows are large and asymmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open spaces and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, balconies, and a backyard pool, featuring white and wood paneling and lush landscaping.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with a tall, narrow window, a small entryway with steps, and vertical wooden slats along the wall.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the backyard with a swimming pool, wooden deck, outdoor furniture, and large glass doors opening to the garden.
description_view_2: This angle displays the side with a driveway, a parked car, a balcony above, and a prominent flowering tree near the pool area.
description_view_3: The opposite side features the driveway, carport, vertical wooden slats, and a landscaped garden bed along the wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Small entryway with steps, modern door, and vertical wooden slats as decorative elements
